overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered cyberpunk market street. The scene begins inside a food stall with neon-lit pharmaceutical shops visible across the walkway, then moves past a vendor and through the industrial-arched corridor with cyan and orange neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: food stall interior with service counter

agents.ego_description: standing inside a food stall, looking out at the covered market street beyond the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor in green shirt standing by the counter, holding a cup and looking outward

entered.detail: metal service counter with menu boards and condiment containers
storefront with bright cyan neon signage reading 'PHARMACEUTICALS' and 'OPEN'
rusted metal beams and corrugated roofing with sunlight streaming through gaps
cyan and orange neon signs illuminating the shop fronts across the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a static view from inside a food stall, looking out through an open front into a covered cyberpunk market. A vendor in a green shirt stands to the right near the counter, while across the walkway, a pharmaceutical shop glows with cyan neon signage under an industrial metal roof structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from food stall to covered market walkway

events.description: camera begins moving forward from the static position inside the stall
passing the vendor and moving from the stall interior into the open walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past the service counter and the vendor, moving from the stall interior toward the market walkway

notable_agents.action: vendor remains stationary by the counter as the camera passes by on the left

entered.detail: large yellow poster with 'ALL FOODS' text and cartoon chef character
flattened cardboard boxes scattered on the concrete floor ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving forward, passing the vendor and exiting the food stall into the covered walkway. The pharmaceutical shop facade moves closer from the center distance, while an 'All Foods' advertisement appears on the left wall. The industrial roof structure remains overhead as the stall counter recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market walkway with industrial architecture

events.description: moving into area with stronger neon lighting and visible light shafts penetrating the roof

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market corridor, passing under industrial beams and neon signs

entered.detail: large rusted support beams with attached overhead walkways and piping

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed market walkway, the pharmaceutical shop facade shifts to the left side while drawing nearer. The industrial pillars become prominent in the center view, and cardboard debris lies scattered on the concrete floor. The lighting shifts to emphasize the cyan neon glow against the darker industrial interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching pharmacy storefront in covered market

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing and white cap walks from left to right across the path

agents.ego_description: approaching the pharmacy entrance as a pedestrian crosses the path from the left side

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket and white cap walking across the walkway from left to right

segments.scene_description: Approaching the pharmaceutical shop facade which now dominates the left side of the frame at close range, a pedestrian suddenly crosses from the left wearing dark clothing and a white cap. The cardboard debris on the ground is left behind as the camera continues forward past the 'All Foods' advertisement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the interior of a food stall out into a neon-lit, industrial market corridor. It begins with a static view from inside the stall, looking past a vendor in a green shirt toward a glowing cyan pharmaceutical shop across the walkway. As the camera moves forward and exits the stall, the counter recedes and an All Foods advertisement emerges on the left wall while the industrial roof structure looms overhead. The scene then shifts deeper into the enclosed walkway, where the pharmaceutical shop moves to the left and the lighting intensifies into a deep cyan glow against concrete floors scattered with cardboard debris. Finally, the camera pushes past the advertisement and the debris as a pedestrian in a white cap crosses the path, bringing the pharmaceutical facade into close, dominating range.
